case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION vs. CUMMINGS, PETER IAN DBA XY PUBLISHING

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CUMMINGS, PETER IAN DBA XY PUBLISHING

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUMMINGS, PETER IAN DBA XY PUBLISHING $1,435.37 PRINCIPAL, $190.97 INTEREST, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,722.34 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
